def negative_sync_api_accepts_coroutine_object_as_regular_value():
    rule_id = "sync_api_accepts_coroutine_object_as_regular_value"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag synchronous interfaces that can accidentally receive coroutine objects and treat them as plain values."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
